Hyperion Systems · Custom Builds

Built by hand.
Built for you.

Every build starts with a quiz. You tell us your budget, your goals, and your taste. We scale every component decision against all three — then build it ourselves. No shortcuts. No filler parts.

Start Your Build → Take the Build Quiz
3+Years of builds
100%Hand-built, in-house
∞Configurations available
01
The Quiz
You answer questions about what you do, what you care about, and what your budget looks like. No tech jargon required.
02
The Scale
We map your inputs against three axes — budget ceiling, longevity value, and your aesthetic taste — and spec accordingly.
03
The Build
Every cable routed. Every RGB dialed. Custom water loops where appropriate. Status screens. No pre-built shortcuts.
04
The Handoff
Stress tested, documented, and handed off with full support. You get a machine that's ready to run — and someone to call.
